## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling or CI

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated.
- [ ] `make lint` passes.
- [ ] `make type` passes.
- [ ] `make coverage` passes locally.
- [ ] `make security` passes locally.
- [ ] Documentation updated where required.
- [ ] No provider credentials, `.env` files, or other secrets committed.
